case_title: MOHAB MOHAMED VS. KARIMA NAGUIB ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MOHAB MOHAMED WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HIS DAUGHTER SARAH ABDELAZIZ. DEFENDANT KARIMA NAGUIB WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY ARABIC INTERPRETER HANY FARAY. DEFENDANT MOHAMED IBRAHIM ALI WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
